players_detected.apparel_summary: white t-shirt, grey sweatpants, black shoes

skill_indicators.signature_move_detected: Consistent baseline drives with good depth, favoring the middle of the court.
tactical_tendencies: Prefers to drive the ball rather than dink.
Maintains good depth on baseline shots.
Moves methodically to cover the court.
improvement_opportunities: Incorporate more dinking and net play to vary attack.
Develop a stronger transition game to approach the net more effectively.
Improve court coverage to handle faster pace and wider shots.

brand_detection.unidentified_equipment_notes: Paddles are visible but brand is not discernible. Shoes are dark colored.
brand_detection.unidentified_products_notes: Water bottles are visible on the sideline but brands are not readable.

paddle_intel.notes: Paddles are standard shape and appear to be graphite or composite. Grip tape is dark.

storytelling.narrative_arc_summary: Two players engage in a consistent baseline rally with multiple drives.

predicted_badges.reasoning: The clip features a sustained rally with at least 10 shots, primarily consisting of drives.
The dominant shot type is driving, indicating a preference for power and pace.
The players maintained a rally for the duration of the clip with no apparent errors.

badge_trigger_moments: The sustained exchange of drives from the baseline.
The consistent depth and placement of the shots throughout the rally.

commentary.neutral_announcer_espn: We're seeing a solid baseline rally here between these two players. Both are demonstrating good consistency with their drives, keeping the ball deep and forcing the opponent to react. It's a battle of attrition from the back of the court.
commentary.hype_announcer_charged: WOAH! Back and forth they go! Pure power from the baseline! These players are UNLOADED on the ball, trading bombs and refusing to give an inch! This is what pickleball is all about – sheer determination!
commentary.coaching_breakdown: Notice the consistent depth on the drives. They're doing a good job of keeping the ball in play and forcing the opponent to hit from a neutral or slightly defensive position. However, they could look to mix in some drops or approach shots to bring themselves to the net and finish points more decisively.
commentary.social_media_caption: Baseline battle! 💥 Consistent drives keep the rally alive.
commentary.ron_burgundy_voice: Well, it appears we have two gentlemen, engaged in a rather spirited game of pickleball. They're hitting the ball... with paddles. And it's going back and forth. Fascinating. Truly fascinating. Stay classy, San Diego.
commentary.chuck_norris_voice: Chuck Norris doesn't play pickleball. Pickleball plays Chuck Norris. These players are merely channeling a fraction of his power.
commentary.color_commentator_banter: You know, I love seeing this kind of baseline play. It's like a chess match, but with more sweat and less royalty. You gotta have the patience to keep that ball deep, and these guys are showing it.
commentary.trash_talk_friendly: Alright, keep it coming! Let's see who blinks first!
commentary.announcement_text_for_tts: Two players are engaged in a consistent baseline rally, trading multiple drives. The rally continues with consistent depth and pace.

daas_signals.clip_summary_one_sentence: Two players engage in a consistent baseline rally, trading multiple drives.
